reason: Frontend template changes must stay aligned with standalone Angular component patterns.
Frontend testability changes must keep auth and report flows explicit and visible.
Backend E2E harness changes should stay layered and improve test coverage without expanding legacy patterns.
Any new backend-side diagnostics should use structured logging and avoid console prints.
This work spans frontend selectors, backend task wiring, and browser automation contracts.
Follow the existing Playwright Java harness and lifecycle pattern.
Follow the existing maker/checker UI structure when adding stable selectors.
